translations.title: How to Choose the Perfect Sofa for Your Living Room
translations.excerpt: Finding the right sofa involves more than just picking a colour. Here's our complete guide.
translations.content:
The sofa is often the centrepiece of a living room. When choosing one, consider the size of your room, the existing colour palette, and how you actually use the space. A sectional might be perfect for a family room but overwhelming in a smaller apartment.

Material matters too: leather is durable and easy to clean, while fabric offers more texture and warmth. Velvet is on-trend but requires more care. Whatever you choose, sit in it first — comfort is non-negotiable.
translations.meta_title: How to Choose a Sofa | Demo Blog
translations.meta_description: Complete guide to choosing the right sofa.

translations.title: Interior Design Trends for 2025
translations.excerpt: From earthy palettes to maximalist accents — here's what's trending.
translations.content:
Interior design in 2025 is all about bringing the outdoors in. Earthy tones like terracotta, sage green, and warm beige dominate palettes. Natural materials — rattan, bamboo, linen — are everywhere.

On the other end of the spectrum, maximalism is making a comeback. Layered textures, bold patterns, and curated collections of objects are replacing the stark minimalism of the previous decade. The key is intention: each piece should tell a story.
translations.meta_description: Discover the top interior design trends for 2025.

translations.title: How to Care for Wooden Furniture
translations.excerpt: Wooden furniture can last a lifetime with the right care. Here's how.
translations.content:
Wooden furniture is an investment that rewards proper care. Dust regularly with a soft, dry cloth, and avoid harsh chemical cleaners that strip the finish.

For deeper cleaning, use a slightly damp cloth followed by a dry one. Polish every few months with a product suited to your wood's finish. Keep furniture away from direct sunlight and heat sources, which cause warping and fading over time.
translations.meta_title: Wooden Furniture Care Guide | Demo Blog
translations.meta_description: Learn how to properly care for wooden furniture.
